basic_details.job_title: IGRUA Dispatch Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA) Dispatch Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IGRUA. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IGRUA Dispatch Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Commercial Pilot License (CPL), Experience in Flight Operations in FTO in India
qualification.details: Holder of a Commercial Pilot License (CPL) Experience in Flight Operations in a Flying Training Organization (FTO) in India

salary_details.details: Rs. 40,000/month + Transport Allowance Rs. 1,800/month + Aviation Allowance Rs. 300/month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IGRUA Dispatch Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indira_gandhi_rashtriya_uran_akademi_igr: Commercial Pilot License (CPL), Experience in Flight Operations in FTO in India

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Dispatch Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IGRUA Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IGRUA Dispatch Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Holder of a Commercial Pilot License (CPL) Experience in Flight Operations in a Flying Training Organization (FTO) in India

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 40,000/month + Transport Allowance Rs. 1,800/month + Aviation Allowance Rs. 300/month

rows.event: Last Date for receipt of applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Dispatch Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IGRUA Dispatch Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IGRUA Dispatch Officer position is 25th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Dispatch Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Commercial Pilot License (CPL) and possess experience in Flight Operations within a Flying Training Organization (FTO) in India.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Dispatch Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Dispatch Officer post is 35 years, calculated as of 1st July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Dispatch Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 42,100 per month, along with allowances.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IGRUA Dispatch Officer job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Ensure you prepare your bio-data, attach required documents, and send it before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Dispatch Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, followed by an Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the IGRUA located?
faq.answer: The Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi is located in Amethi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 229302.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, labeled as 'Official Notification PDF'.
